name: Bug
description: Intended behavior is broken or regressed.

name: Improvement
description: Better version of an existing capability.

name: Refactor
description: Internal code improvement without behavior change.

name: Infra
description: Build, CI, deploy, tooling, or environment work.

name: Docs
description: Documentation, specs, ADRs, or written process.

name: Chore
description: Maintenance that does not fit other types.
